skill_loop.deepening: after repeated GEMM micro-lever rejects, switched to a structural real-data-layout primitive from the alien-graveyard no-gaps queue

target.hotspot_basis: fresh RCH linalg profile after pass56: eig_48x48_f64 27.616 ms [26.492, 28.760] on vmi1167313, second only to GEMM; prior GEMM register, parallel, and SIMD levers failed the keep gate

lever.name: real-Q eig QR layout
lever.description: Keep QR/eig Q matrices as contiguous real f64 buffers internally instead of Vec<(f64, f64)> with guaranteed-zero imaginary parts; convert to Complex128 only at the public eig output boundary.

after.interval_note: same-worker reference upper/lower intervals do not overlap: reference low 12.270 ms, candidate high 12.229 ms

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: QR Gram-Schmidt loops keep the same j/i/k order; RQ and q_total multiplies keep ascending k accumulation order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: No branches choose among equal candidates; convergence and iteration-count behavior are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Arithmetic order and real values are unchanged; only guaranteed-zero imaginary tuple storage is removed internally, and final public Complex128 output wraps each f64 as (v, 0.0).
isomorphism_proof.errors_preserved: Function arity, shape, dtype, and convergence paths are unchanged.
